positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala pattern featuring interconnected celestial elements: crescent moons, starry constellations, and blooming cosmic flowers. The design should be highly detailed, using thick, clean black lines against a luminous, off-white background. Incorporate geometric shapes (triangles, circles, pentagons) seamlessly woven with organic curves, creating a sense of cyclical motion. Color palette suggestions: deep indigo, burnt orange, muted gold, and charcoal grey, used as subtle fills within the primary black line work. Composition should be centered, scalable, and perfectly suitable for screen-printing on t-shirts or tote bags. Aesthetic: Mystical, clean, retro-bohemian, highly ornamental, vector art style, graphic design, perfect silhouette.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, writing, cartoon, fuzzy, blurry, low quality, artifacts, poor anatomy, noisy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, debris, photographic, photo-realistic, gradient background
